baseline_summary: The baseline can keep the packet bounded, but one future-facing sentence still leaves enough interpretive slack that Delta pressure is useful without becoming clearly decisive.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked medium framing risk, challenge outcome narrowed, and 1 ledger entry captured why one stronger sentence initially looked like harmless shorthand.

comparison_axes.reason: Delta names the sentence-level drift better, but the baseline still keeps the overall packet inside a bounded local frame.
Delta is more explicit about limiting the weight of the future-facing sentence.
Delta adds useful pressure, but the baseline was not closing the case dangerously fast.
Delta better surfaces the fact that one sentence is carrying more posture than support.
The baseline reaches a similar bounded next move with less interpretive overhead once the sentence is treated conservatively.
